content: Self-Refine can be framed as the short-term, task-specific iterative feedback loop for a LLM, while Reflexion's dynamic long-term memory acts as a cumulative self-reflection "knowledge backbone" that accumulates insights from multiple Self-Refine runs across different tasks to improve future performance. Combining these two creates a fully autonomous self-improving LLM agent that retains generalized lessons rather than just refining individual outputs.
